full_text:
Yang Jun (Jicai) 楊俊 (季才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Jun (楊俊), styledJicai (季才), was born in Huojia county, Henei commandery. Established schools where he governed and helped bring talented men to Wei. Yang Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yang Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
